nasb.text: Then Joseph sent word and invited Jacob his father and all his relatives to come to him, seventy-five persons in all.

esv.text: And Joseph sent and summoned Jacob his father and all his kindred, seventy-five persons in all.

cnv.text: 約瑟就派人去把他父親雅各和全家七十五人都接來。

ccb.text: 后来，约瑟派人去把父亲雅各和全族七十五人都接到埃及。

csbs.text: 于是约瑟派人把他的父亲雅各和所有的亲属请来，一共七十五人。
